primary_question: How should one bridge keep primary and supporting source inputs explicit without widening into graph semantics?
summary_50: Source-owned tiny export for explicit primary and supporting provenance.
summary_200: Source-owned tiny export capsule for a technique that keeps multi-source input ordering visible so downstream KAG and bridge readers preserve provenance priority without replacing the authored bundle.
provenance_note: Guide to source, not source replacement, built from source-owned technique surfaces.
non_identity_boundary: Derived export capsule for KAG consumers; authored technique meaning remains in aoa-techniques markdown.
